top_signals.title: Vanguard Buys Inflation-Protected Bonds on an Oil-Market Oddity
top_signals.summary: Unusual moves in an oil-market gauge are prompting Vanguard Asset Management Ltd. to buy insurance against stickier-than-expected US inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Japan Long Bonds Rise as Katayama Urges More Pension Investment
top_signals.summary: Japan’s long-term bond yields fell after Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama said the government wants to encourage pension funds, including the Government Pension Investment Fund, to increase investment in domestic financial assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: NSA revives 'Tailored Access Operations' name for elite hacking unit
top_signals.summary: NSA last week changed the moniker of its Office of Computer Network Operations (CNO) back to Tailored Access Operations (TAO), a name that is sure to elicit nostalgia among the broader digital community for a group with roots in the early 1990s.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
